login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your PIVOT workspace
login.device_sent: A verification code was sent to your email.
login.error_not_verified: Your email is not verified yet. Check your inbox.
login.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
login.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.error_google_not_configured: Google Sign-In is not configured in this environment.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join PIVOT Platform
register.success_body: Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
register.success_no_email: Didn't receive it? Check your spam or
register.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in {{ time }}.

resend.title: Resend activation email
resend.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a new activation link.
resend.sent_body: If this email matches an unverified account, an activation link has been sent.

verify_email.success_body: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify_email.error_body: This link has expired or has already been used. Request a new link from the login page.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgot_password.sent_body: If this email matches a PIVOT account, you will receive a reset link within a few minutes.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.subtitle: Choose a secure password.
reset_password.expired_body: This reset link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
reset_password.success_body: You can now sign in with your new password.

device_confirm.title: Device verification
device_confirm.subtitle: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it to confirm this login.
device_confirm.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Return to login.
device_confirm.error_invalid: Incorrect or expired code. Check your email.

session.expired: Session expired, please sign in again.
session.expired_remember_me: Your long-lived session has expired, please sign in again.

password.title: Change my password
password.subtitle: Choose a new, secure password for your account.
password.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

email.title: Change email address
email.subtitle: A confirmation link will be sent to the new address.
email.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
email.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
email.sent_body: If the address is available, a confirmation link valid for 24 hours has been sent to the new address you provided.
email.sent_instruction_1: Open the email received at the new address and click the confirmation link.
email.sent_instruction_2: The link is valid for 24 hours and can only be used once.
email.sent_instruction_3: Your current address stays active until you confirm the change.

confirm.success_body: Your new email address is now active. You can use it to sign in.
confirm.invalid_body: This confirmation link is not valid.
confirm.expired_body: This confirmation link has expired (24-hour validity). Please request a new email change.
confirm.already_used_body: This confirmation link has already been used or is no longer valid.
confirm.target_taken_body: This email address is now associated with another account. Please choose a different address.
confirm.rate_limited_body: Too many confirmation attempts. Please try again later.
confirm.error_body: The email change could not be confirmed right now. Please try again later.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question? A problem? The PIVOT team will get back to you.
contact.success: Message sent! A confirmation email has been sent to you.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again or write to us at contact@pivot.app.
